use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATING SECONDARY HYPERPARATHYROIDISM (SHPT)

indications.text:
PARSABIV is indicated for the treatment of secondary hyperparathyroidism (HPT) in adult patients with
chronic kidney disease (CKD) on hemodialysis.
Limitations of Use:
PARSABIV has not been studied in adult patients with parathyroid carcinoma, primary hyperparathyroidism, or
with chronic kidney dise...
